principles: Typography-First Hierarchy (Big clean headings, high legibility)
Pill Accents (Buttons and tabs use max radius, containers stay rectilinear)
Pure Grayscale (Zero chroma, no color tint — mono only)

card.default: group flex flex-col gap-6 w-full cursor-pointer
card.imageWrapper: relative aspect-[4/3] w-full overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[var(--bg-muted)] transition-all duration-500 group-hover:shadow-lg
card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105
card.title: text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[var(--text-primary)] transition-colors group-hover:text-[var(--text-secondary)]

button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[var(--bg-primary)] px-6 py-3 text-sm lg:text-base font-medium text-[var(--bg-primary-foreground)] shadow-sm hover:opacity-90 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[var(--border-ring)] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 transition-opacity
button.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[var(--border-default)] bg-white px-6 py-3 text-sm lg:text-base font-medium text-[var(--text-primary)] shadow-sm hover:bg-[var(--bg-canvas)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[var(--border-ring)] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors
button.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full px-6 py-3 text-sm lg:text-base font-medium text-[var(--text-secondary)] hover:bg-[var(--bg-muted)] hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[var(--border-ring)] disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors
button._note: All button variants use rounded-full (pill shape). This is a core editorial-tech design decision.

tab.list: inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-[var(--bg-muted)] p-1
tab.trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--text-secondary)] transition-all hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[var(--text-primary)] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm
tab._note: Tabs use pill container (rounded-full list) with pill triggers. Active state gets white bg with shadow.

input.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-[var(--border-emphasis)] bg-white px-4 py-2 text-base ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-[var(--text-tertiary)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[var(--border-ring)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all
input._note: Inputs use rounded-xl (moderate radius), NOT pill. Only buttons and tabs are pill.

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-[var(--bg-primary)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-[var(--bg-primary-foreground)] hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
badge.secondary: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-[var(--bg-muted)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-[var(--text-primary)] hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
badge.outline: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-[var(--border-emphasis)] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-[var(--text-primary)] transition-colors

table.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-xl border border-[var(--border-default)]
table.head: h-14 px-6 text-left align-middle font-medium text-[var(--text-secondary)] [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0

typography.h1: scroll-m-20 text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[var(--text-primary)] lg:text-6xl
typography.h2: scroll-m-20 border-b border-[var(--border-default)] pb-4 mt-16 text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--text-primary)] first:mt-0
typography.h3: scroll-m-20 mt-12 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--text-primary)]
typography.h4: scroll-m-20 mt-8 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--text-primary)]
typography.blockquote: mt-8 border-l-4 border-[var(--border-default)] pl-6 italic text-[var(--text-secondary)] text-lg lg:text-xl
typography.list: my-8 ml-8 list-disc text-base lg:text-lg text-[var(--text-secondary)] [&>li]:mt-3
